title: Find item on multiple columns & one or multiple values
excerpt:
Hi developpers, 
It would be great to be able to find items with multiple columns and multiple values 
For example, find item on an email column and a status column or another column with the same query! 
Thank you for a…

posts.author: Marc_Furberg (Marc Furberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi developpers,

It would be great to be able to find items with multiple columns and multiple values

For example, find item on an email column and a status column or another column with the same query!

Thank you for all your work

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Marc_Furberg,

I am not sure I understood the request here.

Would you be able to give me an example using these items?

image1019×150 16.8 KB

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Marc_Furberg (Marc Furberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mathias,

i wanted to know if it was possible to query items with status and email column at the same time or any other column !

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Marc_Furberg,

I am not sure I understand.

Do you want to query items that have a specific value in one column AND a specific value in a different column?

If so, that is not possible as of today. You would need to query for the items with a specific value for column A, get the IDs, and then query for items with a specific value in column B, and check which IDs are in both responses.

Is that the information you needed?

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Marc_Furberg (Marc Furberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you,
unfortunately it was what i meaned !

is it in a roadmap ?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Marc_Furberg,

Unfortunately this is not on our roadmap, but I’m happy to pass this feedback along to our team for their consideration.
